/nix/store/3awwcrqv9lpcq553zs2zb7y0mr5niswd-clang-wrapper-19.1.7/bin/clang++ -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -g -fprofile-instr-generate -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bench_std_headers.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bench_std_headers.dir/tests/benchs/bench_std_headers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_std_headers.dir/cxb/cxb.cpp.o -o bench_std_headers  deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2Maind.a deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2d.a
